name: Kisses From Italy Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Kisses From Italy Inc. (together with its subsidiaries, hereinafter referred to as us, our, we, or the Company) was incorporated in the State of Florida on March 7, 2013, with a focus on developing a fast, casual food dining chain restaurant business. It currently operates through the following wholly-owned subsidiaries: (1) Kisses From Italy 9 th LLC, (2) Kisses From Italy-Franchising LLC; and (3) Kisses From Italy, Inc. (Canada), a company incorporated under the laws of Canada ...
